##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=CaBe(PO_4_)(OH)
##LOCALITY=Shigar Valley, northeast of Skardu, Baltistan, Pakistan
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Herb Obodda
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless equant crystal
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060353
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Ca_0.99_Mn_0.01_)Be_1.00_P_1.00_O_4_((OH)_0.52_F_0.48_) ; trace amounts of Na  Be not measured but assumed by stoichiometry  OH estimated by charge balance
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
